description_long: This is a cylindrical portable stereo speaker with a rugged, camouflage-patterned fabric exterior, designed for outdoor use. The ends are capped with robust black plastic, one side featuring a passive radiator and the other a handle integrated into the cap for easy carrying. A prominent control panel with tactile rubberized buttons is located along the top, including a large central button and smaller adjacent controls, all marked with clear icons. The speaker grille wraps around the main body, allowing sound to emanate in all directions, and a small rectangular brand logo is visible on the side. There are subtle LED indicators near the base, likely for battery or connectivity status. The overall build suggests water resistance and durability, suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or outdoor gatherings.
description: A rugged, cylindrical portable stereo speaker with a camouflage fabric exterior, black plastic end caps, a top control panel, and a visible brand logo.
description_view_0: The speaker is shown at an angle highlighting the top control panel with rubberized buttons and the camouflage fabric body.
description_view_1: This view displays the side with the prominent brand logo, LED indicators, and the handle integrated into the end cap.
description_view_2: The end cap with the passive radiator is visible, along with the camouflage pattern wrapping around the body.
description_view_3: The rear view is mostly obscured by a red panel, with only the black end caps slightly visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular red logo with white text 'JBL' located on the side of the speaker grille.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a tightly woven mesh fabric with a camouflage pattern, allowing sound to pass through while providing a rugged, decorative look.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A row of tactile rubberized buttons is located along the top, including a large central button and smaller adjacent buttons, each marked with clear icons.
